scripts.cleanup:d1:backup: sh -c 'mkdir -p backups && npx -y wrangler d1 export lunch --remote --output backups/lunch-$(date +%F-%H%M%S).sql'
scripts.cleanup:d1:report: npx -y wrangler d1 execute lunch --remote --file scripts/sql/d1-image-cleanup-report.sql --json
scripts.cleanup:d1:apply: npx -y wrangler d1 execute lunch --remote --file scripts/sql/d1-image-cleanup-apply.sql --yes
scripts.cleanup:d1:verify: npx -y wrangler d1 execute lunch --remote --file scripts/sql/d1-image-cleanup-verify.sql --json
